explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.path_to_improvement: Document AI governance structure, including oversight of vendor AI tools.

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.findings: The Andersons Terms of Use document states users are advised against entering Personally Identifiable Information (PII) into the AI. This document also describes a data handling policy for the AI.
privacy.path_to_improvement: Publish AI-specific privacy impact assessments or data handling procedures.

relevant_sources.summary: The Andersons Terms of Use document supports the **transparency** pillar by disclosing the use of AI in website chat features and outlining its capabilities. It also provides evidence for the **privacy** pillar by advising users against entering Personally Identifiable Information (PII), indicating a data handling policy for the AI.
relevant_sources.title: The Andersons Terms of Use - AI Chat Feature Disclosure

transparency.findings: The Andersons Terms of Use document describes the use of AI in website chat features. This document also outlines the capabilities of the AI chat features.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Publish detailed documentation (model cards, system specs) for AI systems deployed.

relevant_sources.summary: The Andersons Terms of Use document supports the **transparency** pillar by disclosing the use of AI in website chat features and outlining its capabilities. It also provides evidence for the **privacy** pillar by advising users against entering Personally Identifiable Information (PII), indicating a data handling policy for the AI.
relevant_sources.title: The Andersons Terms of Use - AI Chat Feature Disclosure

summary.overall_findings: The Andersons' public disclosures describe the use and capabilities of AI in website chat features, addressing the transparency pillar. Additionally, published materials advise users against entering Personally Identifiable Information (PII) into the AI and describe a data handling policy, covering privacy. These two pillars represent the documented evidence for 2 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars. Drawing from 6 publicly available sources, the assessment found no qualifying public evidence for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars.
